name: What proof do I need for my back injury claim at my Murray job?
description: Medical reports, employer incident form, wages, witnesses.[1]

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my back injury claim at my Murray job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical reports, employer incident form, wages, witnesses.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, incident report, witness statements, and wage documentation.** Explain to doctors how/when/where it happened for Form 123.[1] Key factors: Photos, supervisor notes strengthen cases; pre-existing issues need aggravation proof. Report immediately, follow treatment, collect employer forms. Solid evidence prevents denials.
